name: write-spec
description: Generate adversarially reviewed specification files for a ticket using Actor-Critic reflection.

spec_kind.description: Template kind: rfc, adr, design-doc, tech-spec, srs, implementation-plan, bugfix-spec, api-contract.

draft_content.description: Optional draft markdown for Critic evaluation (Actor-Critic loop).

attempt.description: Reflection attempt counter (managed by orchestrator retries).
